channel.title: Recent & Upcoming Talks on Arindam Chowdhury
channel.description: Recent content in Recent & Upcoming Talks on Arindam Chowdhury

item.title: Distributed Fault Tolerant Multi-Robot Area Coverage Under Limited Communication Ranges
item.description: Analysed Multi-Agent area coverage problem for surveillance purposes.

item.title: Creating Cloud of Local Servers
item.description: Cloud based Virtual Machine management system using KVM.

item.title: Network Traffic Generator and Packet Analyzer
item.description: Network traffic analysis and IPv4 packet generation for custom simulation.

item.title: Virtual Campus Project
item.description: Creating a virtual walk-through of IIIT-Delhi campus.
